regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in Queenstown typically charge $35–$60/m² installed, reflecting the premium Otago Lakes market. Demand from new builds and holiday property upgrades keeps tradies busy year-round; book at least 4–6 weeks ahead.

businesses.name: Thermalay
businesses.known_for: Wholesale flooring supplier and installer with 15+ years experience in residential and commercial carpet laying across Otago and Southland; uses professional power-stretching equipment.

businesses.name: Charlie Collins
businesses.known_for: 40 years self-employed carpet layer based in Queenstown Lakes; praised for old-fashioned values and completing jobs quickly to a high standard.

businesses.name: Infinity Floors
businesses.known_for: Independent two-person flooring team based in Queenstown Lakes with 20 years combined experience in residential and commercial carpet and vinyl installation.
